message:
feat(core): add multi-host connector mesh federation module

Introduces connector_mesh.rs (1365 lines) implementing multi-host
connector workload federation with zone-aware routing, health tracking,
and partition tolerance:

- ConnectorMesh: central registry for hosts, zones, and routing tables
- Zone-aware routing with affinity scoring and failure-class tracking
- Host health states (Healthy/Degraded/Unreachable) with heartbeat TTL
- Partition detection and mesh-wide health aggregation
- Registered as pub mod in lib.rs

Part of ft-3681t.5.8 (multi-host mesh federation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
